action.reasoning: Observation: Best result was 90.5 safe_follow_steps (iter 14) with PD control. Current predict.py is truncated. Main issues: 1) Robot takes too long to reach human (avg_dist=4.2m), 2) Angular derivative term opposes tracking of moving human, 3) Stuck recovery just turns in place. Analysis: Need faster approach (allow forward speed at moderate angles), better following (reduce damping that opposes tracking), and back-up-and-turn recovery. Also need to read actual facing_threshold from config. Decision: Write complete predict.py with improved gains, faster approach, reduced angular damping in safe zone, and submit eval immediately.
action.command: python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output out.json
